title: Sandbox tests
description:
Add tests/test_sandbox.py covering guard enforcement, CLI flags, and env loading
Use tmp_path fixtures, no real subprocess execution
Verification: `python -m pytest tests/test_sandbox.py -v`
acceptance_criteria: workdir inside or equal to root allowed while outside raises SecurityError
aider command includes --root flag in tests
codex command includes -C flag in tests
SecurityError guard runs before subprocess execution
